summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Expenses Management feature. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed: Expenses page loads correctly, stats cards display, filters work, CRUD operations (create/edit/delete) function properly, category management works, and Dashboard shows monthly expense summary.

design_issues.issue: Missing aria-describedby attribute for accessibility (console warning)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing expenses (₹25,000 Salaries, ₹1,500 Office Supplies)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Expenses Management fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_expenses.py cover: expense categories CRUD (6 default categories, custom category create/delete, cannot delete default), expenses CRUD (create with all payment types, list with filters, update, delete), monthly stats API. Frontend verified: sidebar navigation to Expenses, stats cards (This Month, Last Month, Change %, Transactions), filters (date range, category, payment type, payment account), Add Expense modal, Edit expense, Delete expense, Categories management modal, Dashboard expense summary card.

expense_categories.get_defaults: PASS - Returns 6 default categories (Transport/Shipping, Office Supplies, Salaries, Utilities, Marketing, Miscellaneous)
expense_categories.create_custom: PASS - Custom categories can be created with is_default=false
expense_categories.delete_custom: PASS - Custom categories can be deleted
expense_categories.cannot_delete_default: PASS - Default categories return 400 error on delete attempt

expenses_crud.create_all_fields: PASS - Expense created with category, date, amount, payment_type, payment_account, paid_by, reason
expenses_crud.create_net_banking: PASS - Net Banking payment type works
expenses_crud.filter_date_range: PASS - Filters by start_date and end_date
expenses_crud.delete: PASS - Deletes expense and removes from list

expense_stats.monthly_stats: PASS - Returns current_month_total, previous_month_total, change_percent, by_category, expense_count
expense_stats.category_breakdown: PASS - by_category shows expense totals per category

dashboard_integration.expense_summary_card: PASS - Dashboard shows Monthly Expenses card with This Month, Last Month, Change %, Transactions

sidebar_navigation.expenses_link: PASS - Visible in sidebar and navigates to /expenses

frontend_ui.expenses_page: PASS - Renders with header, stats cards, filters, expense list
frontend_ui.stats_cards: PASS - Shows This Month, Last Month, Change, Transactions
frontend_ui.filters: PASS - Date range, category, payment type, payment account filters work
frontend_ui.add_expense_modal: PASS - Opens with all required fields
frontend_ui.edit_expense: PASS - Edit modal opens and updates work
frontend_ui.delete_expense: PASS - Delete confirmation and removal works
frontend_ui.categories_modal: PASS - Shows all 6 default categories with Default badges
